context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 tested the Referral Program feature. Database was wiped clean - only admin@kalmori.com exists. Referral code format is KAL + last 6 chars of user ID in uppercase. Admin's referral code is KAL336CA7. The referral flow: 1) User gets unique referral link/code from /api/referral/my-link, 2) New user registers with ?ref=CODE in URL, 3) After signup, frontend calls /api/referral/complete to link accounts, 4) Both users get free month of Rise. Admin can view all referral activity at /admin/referrals. IMPORTANT: Do NOT use old credentials (admin@tunedrop.com / Admin123!) - they no longer exist.

endpoints.POST /api/referral/validate: Validates referral code, returns referrer info

frontend_pages./referrals: User referral dashboard with code, copy button, stats, how-it-works
frontend_pages./admin/referrals: Admin referral overview with top referrers and recent signups

database_wipe.evidence: LAUNCH50 promo code returns 404, old admin account returns 401
